# nullcloud_vpc (Data Source)

Fetches a NullCloud VPC by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nullcloud_vpc" "example" {
  id = "vpc-abc123"
}

output "vpc_crn" {
  value = data.nullcloud_vpc.example.crn
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The ID of the VPC.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `crn` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `status` (String)
